data.title: 채색 캔버스 / 彩りキャンバス (Korean Ver.)
data.author: Park Shi Yoon / Kim Soonmi / Mitsukiyo / Z:U / ESTE
data.introduction:
传奇乐队Sugar Rush演唱的歌曲！

> Composed/Arranged by Mitsukiyo (STUDIOALOH)
Lyrics by Mitsukiyo (STUDIOALOH)
Korean Translation by Z:U
Vocals Park Shi Yoon, Kim Soonmi
Mixed/Mastered by ESTE (STUDIOALOH)
